info.name: Figma Get Library Analytics Usage Data

params.name: file_key
params.description: File key of the library to fetch analytics data for.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor indicating what page of data to fetch. Obtained from prior API call.

params.name: group_by
params.description: A dimension to group returned analytics data by. Accepts "component" or "file".

params.name: order
params.description: How to order response rows by number of instances. This param can be either "asc" or "desc" (default).

items.docs: Returns a list of library analytics usage data broken down by the requested dimension.
